project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 71 packages, 16 apps, pnpm workspaces + turborepo
build_system: pnpm + turbo. Each package has scripts: typecheck (tsc --noEmit), build (tsc), test (vitest run), lint (eslint .)
test_framework: vitest with globals enabled (describe/it/expect without imports). Tests live in src/__tests__/*.test.ts. Root vitest.config.ts sets globals:true.
build_command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build (via turbo, turbo.json dependsOn ^build for typecheck/test)
verification_instructions: 1) pnpm typecheck --filter=PACKAGE passes. 2) pnpm test --filter=PACKAGE passes. 3) pnpm build --filter=PACKAGE passes.
setup_instructions: pnpm install already done. node >=22. All packages have deps pre-installed.
environment_constraints: No external network for npm installs. All dependencies already in pnpm store. No @ts-ignore or @ts-expect-error allowed. tsconfig: strict, noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, noUncheckedIndexedAccess.
contribution_requirements: No fake components. Every test must test real logic not just 'class exists'. typecheck + build must pass after changes. Keep existing type definitions but extend them.
key_patterns: Each package: src/index.ts re-exports all. Types in src/types.ts. Modules in subdirectories. Tests in src/__tests__/. Package names: @quant/package-name. tsconfig: ES2022/ESNext/bundler/strict/composite. Uses crypto.randomUUID() for IDs, Date.now() for timestamps. No external deps in skeleton packages (pure logic).
relevant_files: packages/agent-swarm/src/ (7 files - orchestrator, budget, scratchpad, audit, types, index, tests)
packages/voice-first-os/src/ (6 files - commands, elder, mode, types, index, tests)
packages/data-warehouse/src/ (6 files - query, export, residency, types, index, tests)
packages/wellbeing/src/ (7 files - detection, tracking, bedtime, integrity, types, index, tests)
packages/spatial-ui/src/ (6 files - xr, panels, input, types, index, tests)
packages/robotics-bridge/src/ (6 files - commands, registry, safety, types, index, tests)
packages/dev-platform/src/ (6 files - auth, marketplace, webhooks, types, index, tests)
packages/launch-beta/src/ (8 files - cohort, flags, feedback, metrics x2, types, index, tests)
packages/launch-public/src/ (7 files - checklist, status, store, support, types, index, tests)
packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/ (30 test files, 3400 LOC - reference for test depth/style)
directory_structure: monorepo root: packages/ (71 packages), apps/ (16 Next.js apps), turbo.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml. Each package: package.json, tsconfig.json, src/ with subdirectories per concern.
